cv.name: Arsenii
cv.position: Full-Stack Developer (Next.js + FastAPI) with Blockchain Background
cv.bio: I am a full-stack developer focused on building production web products with Next.js and FastAPI. I combine strong frontend and backend engineering with blockchain experience, plus hands-on work in browser automation and data parsing using Playwright, Selenium, and Python tooling.

sectionContent.heroTagline: I build production-ready products with Next.js and FastAPI, Web3 applications, browser automation.
sectionContent.aboutExtraParagraphOne: I care about readable architecture, reliable integrations, and shipping features that create measurable product value across frontend, backend, and automation workflows.
sectionContent.aboutExtraParagraphTwo: My core stack is Next.js + FastAPI, and I complement it with blockchain integrations, browser automation, and parsing pipelines to solve real business tasks end-to-end.

aboutHighlights.title: Next.js Frontend Engineering
aboutHighlights.description: Responsive interfaces, component systems, and SEO-friendly product pages

aboutHighlights.title: FastAPI Backend Development
aboutHighlights.description: REST APIs, async services, data models, and production integrations

aboutHighlights.title: Blockchain Integration
aboutHighlights.description: Smart contracts, wallet flows, and decentralized data using EVM tooling

aboutHighlights.title: Automation & Parsing
aboutHighlights.description: Browser automation and web parsing with Playwright, Selenium, and Python

sectionContent.skillsSubtitle: Technologies and tools I use to bring ideas to life
sectionContent.projectsSubtitle: Selected Next.js + FastAPI products, blockchain builds, and automation/parsing projects shipped end-to-end

projects.name: Decentralized Portfolio Website
projects.description: A modern portfolio built with Next.js, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS. Portfolio content is delivered from Base Sepolia and IPFS to keep the data layer decentralized.

projects.name: Resume Match
projects.description: Full-stack platform for vacancy search and resume tailoring with a Next.js frontend and FastAPI backend services.

projects.name: SyncWalk
projects.description: A full-stack audio tour platform with solo and synchronized group listening, built with Next.js, FastAPI, WebSockets, and Redis.

projects.name: Algo Zeus Landing
projects.description: A landing page for a hedge fund with chart and live metrics

projects.name: Status LTD
projects.description: Marketing site for Status LTD — pharmaceutical-grade aluminum crimp caps. Built with Next.js (App Router), React, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS.

projects.name: True Price
projects.description: Marketing website for the True Price restaurant network, built with Next.js and TypeScript.

projects.name: Gold Line Barbershop
projects.description: Marketing website for Gold Line Barbershop built with Next.js, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS.

projects.name: Blush Nail Studio
projects.description: Marketing site for a New York City nail studio built with Next.js and TypeScript.

projects.name: Hello web3
projects.description: A simple web3 application for leaving messages on the blockchain

projects.name: Synthetic futures-options arbitrage
projects.description: Python automation script for arbitrage analysis between options and futures on Binance, including market data parsing.

projects.name: GMX funding arbitrage bot
projects.description: TypeScript automation bot for funding arbitrage on GMX with on-chain data handling and Telegram notifications.

projects.name: GMGN solana sniper bot
projects.description: Node.js automation bot for Solana sniper workflows on GMGN with real-time monitoring logic.
